info.title: fsdocs
info.description:
Copyright 2014
convert    convert a single document (.md, .fsx, .ipynb) to HTML or another
output format without building a full documentation site
build      build the documentation for a solution based on content and
defaults
watch      build the documentation for a solution based on content and
defaults, watch it and serve it
init       initialize a docs folder with a default index.md and optionally a
_template.html
help       Display more information on a specific command.
version    Display version information.

options.name: --input
options.description:
(Default: docs) Input directory of documentation
content.

options.name: --projects
options.description:
Project files to build API docs for outputs, defaults
to all packable projects.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output Folder (default 'output' for 'build' and
'tmp/watch' for 'watch'.

options.name: --noapidocs
options.description: (Default: false) Disable generation of API docs.

options.name: --ignoreuncategorized
options.description:
(Default: false) Disable generation of 'Other'
category for uncategorized docs.

options.name: --ignoreprojects
options.description: (Default: false) Disable project cracking.

options.name: --strict
options.description:
(Default: false) Fail if there is a problem
generating docs.

options.name: --eval
options.description: (Default: false) Evaluate F# fragments in scripts.

options.name: --qualify
options.description:
(Default: false) In API doc generation qualify the
output by the collection name, e.g.
'reference/FSharp.Core/...' instead of
'reference/...' .

options.name: --saveimages
options.description:
(Default: none) Save images referenced in docs
(some|none|all). If 'some' then image links in
formatted results are saved for latex and ipynb
output docs.

options.name: --sourcefolder
--sourcerepo
options.description:
Source repository for github links (defaults to value
of `<FsDocsSourceRepository>` from project file, else
`<RepositoryUrl>/tree/<RepositoryBranch>` for Git
repositories)

options.name: --linenumbers
options.description: (Default: false) Add line numbers.

options.name: --nonpublic
options.description:
(Default: false) The tool will also generate
documentation for non-public members

options.name: --mdcomments
options.description:
(Default: false) Assume /// comments in F# code are
markdown style (defaults to value of
`<UsesMarkdownComments>` from project file)

options.name: --parameters
options.description:
Additional substitution substitutions for templates,
e.g. --parameters key1 value1 key2 value2

options.name: --nodefaultcontent
options.description:
Do not copy default content styles, javascript or use
default templates.

options.name: --properties
options.description:
Provide properties to dotnet msbuild, e.g.
--properties Configuration=Release Version=3.4

options.name: --fscoptions
options.description:
Extra flags for F# compiler analysis, e.g. dependency
resolution.

options.name: --clean
options.description: (Default: false) Clean the output directory.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Output file path. Defaults to the input filename with the
output format extension in the current directory.

options.name: --template
options.description:
Path to an HTML (or other format) template file. When
omitted, raw content is written.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description:
(Default: ) Output format: html (default), ipynb, latex,
fsx, markdown. When not specified, inferred from the output
file extension.

options.name: --eval
options.description: (Default: false) Evaluate F# fragments in scripts.

options.name: --linenumbers
options.description: (Default: false) Add line numbers.

options.name: --parameters
options.description:
Additional substitution parameters, e.g. --parameters key1
value1 key2 value2

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --input
options.description:
(Default: docs) The directory to initialize (default:
docs).

options.name: --force
options.description: (Default: false) Overwrite existing files (default: false).

options.name: --with-template
options.description:
(Default: false) Also scaffold a _template.html file in the
docs directory.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.name: --noserver
options.description: (Default: false) Do not serve content when watching.

options.name: --nolaunch
options.description: (Default: false) Do not launch a browser window.

options.name: --open
options.description:
(Default: ) URL extension to launch
http://localhost:<port>/%s.

options.name: --port
options.description:
(Default: 8901) Port to serve content for
http://localhost serving.
